text: Surface only evidence-backed Attention Items for categories or totals that cross explicit versioned thresholds, without prescribing financial action. Evidence [assumption A2]: usefulness and false-severity behavior require owner-only representative evaluation before planning.
target: Each Attention Item cites one report metric or signal, the exact threshold and severity rule, deterministic ordering, and its evidence state; no item is generated from unavailable, stale, or insufficient evidence.
